1.description: Any pass attempted from one player to another including free kicks, corners, throw-ins, goal kicks and goal assists

2.description: Attempted pass made to a player who is in an offside position

3.description: Attempted dribble past an opponent (excluding when qualifier 211 is present as this is 'overrun' and is not always a duel event)

4.description: This event ID shown when a foul is committed resulting in a free kick

5.description: Shown each time the ball goes out of play for a throw-in or goal kick

6.description: Ball goes out of play for a corner kick

7.description: Tackle = dispossesses an opponent of the ball. Outcome 1 = win & retain possession or out of play, 0 = win tackle but not possession

8.description: When a player intercepts any pass event between opposition players and prevents the ball reaching its target. Cannot be a clearance.

9.description: Unforced error / loss of possession - i.e. bad control of ball – Replaced with Unsuccessful Touch + Overrun in recent seasons

10.description: Goalkeeper event; saving a shot on goal. Can also be an outfield player event with qualifier 94 for blocked shot.

11.description: Goalkeeper event; catching a crossed ball

12.description: Player under pressure hits ball clear of the defensive zone or/and out of play

13.description: Any shot on goal which goes wide or over the goal

14.description: Whenever the ball hits the frame of the goal

15.description: Shot saved - this event is for the player who made the shot. Qualifier 82 can be added for blocked shot.

17.description: Bookings - will have red, yellow or 2nd yellow qualifier plus a reason

19.description: Player comes on as a substitute

20.description: Player is forced to leave the pitch due to injury and the team have no substitutions left

21.description: Player comes back on the pitch

22.description: When an outfield player has to replace the goalkeeper

27.description: Used when there is a stoppage in play such as a player injury

28.description: Used when the stoppage ends and play resumes

34.description: Team line up - qualifiers 30, 44, 59, 130, 131 will show player line up and formation

35.description: Player moved to a different position but the team formation remained the same

36.description: Player is forced to change jersey number, qualifier will show the new number

37.description: Event 30 signals end of half. This signals end of the match and thus data collection.

38.description: Goal has occurred but it is pending additional detail qualifiers from Opta. Will change to event 16.

39.description: Shot on goal has occurred but is pending additional detail qualifiers from Opta. Will change to event 15.

41.description: Goalkeeper event; ball is punched clear

42.description: A player shows a good piece of skill on the ball such as a step over or turn on the ball

43.description: Event has been deleted – the event will remain as it was originally with the same ID but will be resent with the type altered to 43.

44.description: Aerial duel – 50/50 when the ball is in the air. Outcome will represent whether the duel was won or lost

45.description: When a player fails to win the ball as an opponent successfully dribbles past them

47.description: This can occur post match if the referee rescinds a card he has awarded

49.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball

50.description: Player is successfully tackled and loses possession of the ball

51.description: Mistake by player losing the ball. Leads to a shot or goals as described with qualifier 169 or 170

52.description: Goalkeeper event; picks up the ball

53.description: Goalkeeper event; cross not successfully caught

54.description: Goalkeeper event; comes out and covers the ball in the box winning possession

55.description: Awarded to last defender when an offside decision is given against an attacker

56.description: Defender uses his body to shield the ball from an opponent as it rolls out of play

57.description: A throw-in not taken correctly resulting in the throw being awarded to the opposing team

59.description: When keeper comes off his line and/or out of his box to clear the ball

60.description: Used when a player does not actually make a shot on goal but was in a good position to score and only just missed receiving a pass

61.description: Used when a player makes a bad touch on the ball and loses possession. Outcome 1 – ball simply hit the player unintentionally. Outcome 0– Player unsuccessfully controlled the ball.

63.description: An event indicating a save has occurred but without full details. Event 10 will follow shortly afterwards with full details.

64.description: Match resumes on a new date after being abandoned mid game

65.description: Any major talking point or error made by the referee – decision will be assigned to the relevant team

66.description: Possession event will appear every 5 mins. **No longer recorded in the feed**

67.description: New duel - 2 players running for a loose ball. GERMAN ONLY. Outcome 1 or 0.

68.description: Delay - ref stops - this to event given to both teams on restart. No Outcome

69.description: Attempt to block a shot or pass - challenge lost. Put Through (qualifiers 266) is the winning duel event.

72.description: New event to just show player who is offside instead of offside pass event

73.description: This is an automated extra event for DFL. It comes with a tackle or an interception and indicates if the player who made the tackle/interception retained the ball after this action or if the tackle/interception was a single ball touch

74.description: Similar to interception but player already very close to ball

76.description: The match has had an early end

77.description: Event indicating that a player is now off the pitch
